zh.Château du Vivier, Fontenay-Trésigny, Se: 法國瑟-吉馬內豐特納-特雷希尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de Valois Capet於1343年7月10日出生在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特a奧-素-洛易時，她的父親Jean II "Le Bon" de France Roi de France24歲，母親Bonne de Luxembourg28歲。她於1352年2月12日與Rey Carlos II de Navarra在法國瑟-吉馬內豐特納-特雷希尼結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1373年11月19日在法國豪-諾門迪艾艾福享年30歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-賽吉登尼斯沙吉登尼斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne de Valois Capet于1343年7月10日出生在法国崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特a奧-素-洛易时，她的父亲Jean II "Le Bon" de France Roi de France24岁，母亲Bonne de Luxembourg28岁。她于1352年2月12日与Rey Carlos II de Navarra在法国瑟-吉馬內豐特納-特雷希尼结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1373年11月19日在法国豪-諾門迪艾艾福享年30岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-賽吉登尼斯沙吉登尼斯。

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Valois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Henri, Normand, Alcide, Armand, Emilien, Gilberte, Gilles, Herve, Jacques, Lucien.
habitational name from (Le) Valois, the name of a few places in France, e.g. in Forez and Limousin.

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Valois Capet was born on 10 July 1343, in Châteauneuf-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, her father, Jean II "Le Bon" de France Roi de France, was 24 and her mother, Bonne de Luxembourg, was 28. She married Rey Carlos II de Navarra on 12 February 1352, in Fontenay-Trésigny, Seine-et-Marne, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 19 November 1373, in Évreux, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, at the age of 30, and was buried in Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Valois Capet est née le 10 juillet 1343, à Châteauneuf-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, son père, Jean II "Le Bon" de France Roi de France, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Bonne de Luxembourg, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Rey Carlos II de Navarra le 12 février 1352, à Fontenay-Trésigny, Seine-et-Marne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 novembre 1373, à Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, France.

de.Châteauneuf-sur-Loire,45110,Loiret,Centr: Châteauneuf-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de Valois Capet am 10. Juli 1343 in Châteauneuf-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean II "Le Bon" de France Roi de France 24 und ihre Mutter Bonne de Luxembourg 28. Sie hat am 12. Februar 1352 in Fontenay-Trésigny, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich Rey Carlos II de Navarra geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. November 1373 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

Lei sposato Rey Carlos II de Navarra il 12 febbraio 1352, nel Fontenay-Trésigny, Seine-et-Marne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 19 novembre 1373, nel Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolta a Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Francia.

ko.Châteauneuf-sur-Loire,45110,Loiret,Centr: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 cha테오니우프-수-로이르
ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Valois Capet(이)가 1343년 7월 10일 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 cha테오니우프-수-로이르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean II "Le Bon" de France Roi de France(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bonne de Luxembourg(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1352년 2월 12일 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 폰텐아이-트e시그니에서 Rey Carlos II de Navarra(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1373년 11월 19일 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 e브레우스에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 세이인-세인트-데니스 세인트-데니스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Valois Capet nasceu em 10 de julho de 1343, em Châteauneuf-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, França, seu pai, Jean II "Le Bon" de France Roi de France, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Bonne de Luxembourg, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Rey Carlos II de Navarra em 12 de fevereiro de 1352, em Fontenay-Trésigny, Seine-et-Marne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de novembro de 1373, em Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, com 30 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, França.

ru.Châteauneuf-sur-Loire,45110,Loiret,Centr: чaтонеуф-сур-лоир, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Valois Capet родилась 10 июля 1343 г. в местности чaтонеуф-сур-лоир, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Jean II "Le Bon" de France Roi de France было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Bonne de Luxembourg, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rey Carlos II de Navarra 12 февраля 1352 г. в местности фонтенеи-трeсигни, сине-ет-марн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 19 ноября 1373 г. в местности eвреукс, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция в возрасте 30 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт-денис, сине-сеинт-денис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

Se casó con Rey Carlos II de Navarra el 12 de febrero de 1352, en Fontenay-Trésigny, Seine-et-Marne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 19 de noviembre de 1373, en Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultada en Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Francia.
